name: aki-content-pipeline-pro
description: AI-powered content creation pipeline: input links + opinions → AI draft → hand-drawn images → multi-platform copies → video scripts → WeChat publish

full.description: Core + video scripts + jianying drafts + WeChat publish

external_dependencies.comfly_api: Required for image generation. COMFLY_API_KEY from https://ai.comfly.chat
external_dependencies.ffmpeg: Required for video export (full only). System install.
external_dependencies.jianying_pro: Required for video drafts (full only). macOS/Windows app.
external_dependencies.yt_dlp: Required for YouTube sources (optional). pip install yt-dlp.
